## Describe your changes
Please provide a brief description of the changes introduced by this pull request, including their rationale and implementation details.

## Testing
Explain how you tested these changes (e.g. regtest functional tests, unit tests, manual checks).
Include reproduction commands or test scripts if applicable.

## Checklist
- [ ] Code follows the formatting guidelines (use yapf/clang-format)
- [ ] Code is well-commented and clean
- [ ] No consensus-breaking changes without design review
- [ ] Tests have been added or updated
- [ ] Documentation has been updated if necessary
